question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 80.00% on 2026-04-09 for the Metaculus question "Will the United States conduct a ground invasion of Iran before 2027?"?
summary:
This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP for "Will the US conduct a ground invasion of Iran before 2027?" will be strictly above 80% on April 9, 2026. The CP is currently at exactly 80.00% as of March 29.

The US and Iran are in an active war (day 32). The Pentagon is specifically preparing for "weeks of ground operations" with thousands of troops (82nd Airborne, Marines) arriving in the region. Trump has signaled willingness for ground action. Iran rejected the US 15-point ceasefire proposal. The April 6 energy strikes deadline is likely to expire without a deal, creating a catalyst for escalation just 3 days before resolution.

The strong upward CP trajectory (3% → 80% in 5 weeks) combined with continued escalation makes it more likely than not that CP will move above 80%. However, the CP sits exactly at the threshold, diplomatic channels remain open, and there's a real possibility it could stay flat or dip slightly. I estimate 65% probability that the CP will be strictly above 80% on April 9.

factors.description: Strong upward CP momentum: 3% → 80% in 5 weeks, with consistent weekly increases (+7, +13 pp in recent weeks)
Active US-Iran war (day 32) with Pentagon specifically preparing ground operations - continued escalation pushes CP higher
Massive troop buildup: 82nd Airborne + Marines deploying to Middle East, thousands of ground-capable forces arriving
April 6 energy strikes deadline likely to expire without deal - catalyst for escalation just 3 days before resolution
Iran rejected US 15-point ceasefire proposal as 'maximalist' - diplomatic deadlock favors continued escalation
CP at EXACTLY the threshold (80.00%) - must be strictly above, even tiny upward movement crosses it but also could stay flat or dip
Diplomatic channels still open: Pakistan/Saudi/Turkey/Egypt mediating, Rubio mentions diplomacy - some probability of de-escalation
Plans described as 'limited operations short of full invasion' - some forecasters may question whether 100-troop threshold is met, moderating CP

reasoning: The reflection confirms my analysis is well-grounded. Let me finalize my forecast.

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/38768) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-09 06:52:25 is higher than 80.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 80.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-09 06:52:25, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
